privileged_info_summary: The quarterly_mailbox_inventory_and_pruning task utilizes a real dataset of emails sourced from the public SpamAssassin corpus. The setup_task.sh script successfully seeds exactly 50 ham emails into the Maildir Inbox and 10 spam emails into the Junk folder, which validates the initial_inbox_count and initial_junk_count claims. The remaining metadata parameters (archive_folder_pattern 'Quarterly-Archive-Q4', report_recipient 'it-admin@company.com', and min_archived_count of 15) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and the scoring criteria in verifier.py.
